routes._comment: Homepage at /SitePages/acasa.aspx — Microsoft SharePoint 2010 (v4master). Self-admitted broken per SITES_COVERAGE.md sec 3.3: a permanent <font color="red"> banner directs users to the alternative search engine at /SitePages/dosare.aspx during "maintenance". Stable hooks: div.header > ul.main-nav, #searchBoxOuter, #s4-bodyContainer, #ctl00_MSO_ContentDiv. The page renders a Romania map (via Raphael.js) with court instances overlaid as anchors. Selector source: direct fetch of https://portal.just.ro/SitePages/acasa.aspx on 2026-05-02 (66KB, IE=8 compatibility forced).

extract._comment: Site-wide top navigation — div.header > ul.main-nav holds Prima pagina / Acces programatic / Harta site / Contact. Stable.
Search box for the global SharePoint search. The input has SharePoint-generated GUID id (unstable) but the wrapping div #searchBoxOuter is stable.
Search examples link — anchor with class .search_ex pointing to /SitePages/despre.aspx#cautare. Stable.

Maintenance / advisory banner — the permanent <font color="red"> warning that points users to the alternative search engine. The pro persona hides this (they know to skip it). Selector targets <font color="red"> inside the main content area, which is unique to this advisory.

Court instance links — the homepage map uses regional
blocks containing
  • Tribunalul/Judecatoria . We collect every court anchor across all regions.

pensioner._comment: Pensioner — keep advisory visible (they need to know about the alt search) and one-tap nav. Hide search box and the geographic map links.

pro._comment: Pro persona hides the advisory banner — they know what to do and want the search-form front and centre.

journalist._comment: Journalist persona surfaces the advisory and the map of courts (the broken-by-design self-admission IS the story).

routes._comment: Case search at /SitePages/dosare.aspx — the alternative search engine that the homepage advisory points to. SharePoint webparts generate GUID IDs that are NOT stable across deployments, but the structural anchors are: #page-title (stable id), .BreadCrumbWrap (stable class), table.s4-wpTopTable (stable SharePoint class), and the label wrappers inside each filter slicer. We target the labels for the input fields rather than the inputs themselves. Selector source: direct fetch of http://portal.just.ro/SitePages/dosare.aspx on 2026-05-02 (63KB).

extract._comment: Page title — #page-title is a stable site-author-defined id, distinct from SharePoint's auto-generated GUID ids.
Breadcrumb — .BreadCrumbWrap is the stable SharePoint breadcrumb container.

Filter labels — every search filter uses a Label
pattern inside table.s4-wpTopTable. Listing the labels lets the renderer build a clean form even though the actual inputs have unstable GUID ids.
Filter inputs — every visible filter input is type=text inside table.s4-wpTopTable. We collect them all so the renderer can match each filter-label to its input.
Apply-filters action — the SharePoint slicer apply control. ms-applyfiltersinactive is the stable class when no filter is active; ms-applyfiltersactive when active. Catch both.
Reset link — anchor pointing back at dosare.aspx with text "Reinitializare cautare". Stable href is the cleanest signal.

pensioner._comment: Pensioner case search — strip everything except the form. One label, one input per row.
